## Validation

- [ ] `yarn ci:verify`
- [ ] I intentionally skipped one or more checks and explained why in the PR description.

## Review Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change inside the existing app/page/feature/shared structure.
- [ ] I reused an existing module before adding a new shared abstraction.
- [ ] I colocated new tests, stories, and styles with the code they support.
- [ ] I updated `src/app/routes/AppRoutes.tsx` when adding or renaming pages.
